vehicles.slot: Slot at base of gear selector on center console or under console trim panel
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Locate shift lock override slot at selector base or under console trim.
Remove trim if needed. Insert key, press plunger.
Press brake. Move Tiptronic lever to N.
Confirm N on cluster.
neutral: Restore power. Shift normally or use slot.
vehicles.notes: Permanent AWD — no transfer case neutral. Flatbed strongly preferred.
vehicles.warn: Permanent AWD — flatbed strongly preferred. Do not wheel-lift without consulting manual.
vehicles.towMethod: FLATBED STRONGLY PREFERRED. PTM AWD — no true neutral for transfer case on most models.
towNotes: Permanent PTM AWD — wheel-lift risks binding.
Verify if transfer case neutral is available for specific trim.
Flatbed always safest option.

airSuspension.description: PASM air suspension available on Cayenne S and Turbo. Provides ride height adjustment.
towingNotes: Jack Mode: hold suspension height switch forward 5-10 seconds until 'Regulation Switched Off' message appears on display.
Jack Mode deactivates suspension regulation for loading/lifting.
Deactivate Jack Mode after loading is complete.
If suspension has failed, vehicle may be at lowest setting — check clearance.

vehicles.slot: Slot at base of gear selector or under console panel
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Locate override slot at selector base.
Insert key, press plunger.
Press brake. Move to N.
S E-Hybrid: 12V only — never touch HV.
Confirm N.
neutral: S E-Hybrid: orange HV cables present — 12V only, flatbed only.
vehicles.notes: S E-Hybrid PHEV: flatbed only, 12V auxiliary only.
vehicles.warn: S E-Hybrid: FLATBED ONLY, HV system present. Standard AWD: flatbed strongly preferred.
vehicles.towMethod: FLATBED STRONGLY PREFERRED. S E-Hybrid: FLATBED ONLY.
towNotes: PTM permanent AWD — flatbed always safest.
S E-Hybrid: orange HV cables — 12V only, flatbed mandatory.

epb.override: Connect 12V. Hold EPB button to release. Manual: Allen wrench to unscrew parking brake actuator from underneath.
steps: Preferred: Connect 12V jump pack. Hold EPB button to release.
Manual: Four-pin EPB actuator connector under vehicle. Connect outer two pins to 12V — polarity selects direction (retract vs extend).
Allen wrench method: unscrew parking brake actuator from caliper underneath vehicle.

airSuspension.description: PASM / PDCC air suspension available. Jack Mode for loading.
towingNotes: Jack Mode: hold suspension height switch forward 5-10 seconds until display shows 'Regulation Switched Off'.
This deactivates suspension control for safe loading on flatbed.

battery.warnings: AGM battery — use AGM-rated pack. S E-Hybrid: 12V only, flatbed only.

knownIssues.title: Jack Mode Required for Air Suspension Loading
knownIssues.detail: When loading a Cayenne with air suspension on a flatbed, activate Jack Mode by holding the suspension height switch forward 5-10 seconds until the dash display shows 'Regulation Switched Off'. Without this, the suspension will actively fight the loading process and may be damaged.

vehicles.trans: 8-speed Tiptronic S or PDK; E-Hybrid PHEV available
vehicles.slot: Electronic gear selector — override slot under console trim near selector
shift: Locate override slot at selector base under console trim.
Insert key, press override plunger.
Press brake. Move to N. Confirm N.
E-Hybrid: 12V only first, then override.
neutral: Restore power. Shift normally or use slot.
vehicles.notes: E-Hybrid PHEV: flatbed only, 12V auxiliary only, orange HV present.
vehicles.warn: E-Hybrid: FLATBED ONLY. Standard: flatbed strongly preferred.
vehicles.towMethod: FLATBED STRONGLY PREFERRED (all). E-Hybrid: FLATBED ONLY.
towNotes: PTM AWD — flatbed mandatory for safety.
E-Hybrid: HV system, flatbed only, 12V auxiliary.

epb.override: Restore 12V. Hold EPB button. Manual: EPB actuator connector under vehicle (outer two pins, polarity controls direction).
steps: Manual: four-pin actuator connector, outer pins, connect to 12V to retract.

airSuspension.description: Standard or optional PASM air suspension. Jack Mode via drive mode button.
towingNotes: Jack Mode: hold suspension height button 5-10 seconds until 'Regulation Switched Off' displayed.
Required before loading on flatbed with air suspension equipped.

battery.warnings: AGM battery. E-Hybrid: 12V only, flatbed only.

vehicles.trans: 7-speed PDK dual-clutch; Macan EV (2024+) single-speed electric
vehicles.drivetrain: AWD (permanent PTM); Macan EV: AWD electric
vehicles.slot: Gear selector at center console — override slot or PDK lever slot
shift: Locate override slot at selector base.
Insert key, press plunger.
Press brake. Move PDK lever to N. Confirm N.
Macan EV: restore 12V. Use Service menu on Porsche Communication Management (PCM) to select Tow Mode.
neutral: Macan EV: 12V auxiliary in frunk/under-hood area.
Gas: shift normally or use slot.
Macan EV: FLATBED ONLY — select Tow Mode on PCM.
vehicles.notes: Macan EV (2024+): FLATBED ONLY, electric drivetrain, Tow Mode via PCM.
vehicles.warn: Macan EV: FLATBED ONLY. Gas AWD: flatbed strongly preferred.
vehicles.towMethod: Gas: flatbed strongly preferred. Macan EV: FLATBED ONLY.
towNotes: PDK dual-clutch: no lubrication without engine — flatbed preferred.
Macan EV: electric drivetrain, flatbed only, use Tow Mode.

epb.override: Restore 12V. Hold EPB button. Manual: EPB actuator under vehicle.
steps: Manual fallback: EPB actuator connector outer pins.

airSuspension.description: PASM air suspension optional. Jack Mode available.
towingNotes: Jack Mode: hold height button 5-10 sec until 'Regulation Switched Off'.

battery.location: Under hood (gas). Front storage area (Macan EV).
battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood — standard (gas) or frunk area (EV)
battery.warnings: Macan EV: flatbed only, 12V only. Gas AWD: flatbed preferred.

vehicles.trans: 7-speed PDK or 8-speed PDK; E-Hybrid PHEV available
vehicles.slot: PDK lever or electronic selector — override at selector base
shift: Find override slot at selector base.
Insert key, press plunger.
Press brake. Move PDK/selector to N.
E-Hybrid: 12V only first.
neutral: E-Hybrid: 12V only, orange HV cables — flatbed only.
vehicles.notes: E-Hybrid PHEV: flatbed only. RWD models can be wheel-lifted from front.
vehicles.warn: E-Hybrid: FLATBED ONLY. AWD: flatbed preferred.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD: lift from front. AWD: flatbed preferred. E-Hybrid: FLATBED ONLY.
towNotes: E-Hybrid: HV system, flatbed only.
RWD: lift front, rear drive wheels roll.
AWD: flatbed safest.

airSuspension.description: PDCC / PASM air suspension available. Jack Mode.
towingNotes: Jack Mode: hold suspension button 5-10 sec.

battery.warnings: AGM battery. E-Hybrid: 12V only, flatbed only.

vehicles.slot: PDK: selector base override slot. Manual: no shift lock — select N via clutch.
shift: PDK: locate override slot at selector base. Insert key, press. Press brake. Move to N.
MANUAL: depress clutch, select Neutral — no shift lock present.
Confirm N on cluster (PDK).
neutral: Battery in FRONT of vehicle (frunk area) — 911 engine is in rear.
12V battery and jump terminals are UNDER the front hood (frunk), not rear engine area.
Connect jump pack to frunk battery terminals.
Restore power. Shift normally or use override.
vehicles.notes: BATTERY IS IN THE FRUNK (front storage) — not at the rear engine. This is a common mistake.
vehicles.warn: Battery is in the FRUNK, not at the rear engine bay. AWD (4S/Turbo): flatbed preferred.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD: lift from front (rear engine/drive wheels roll) or flatbed. AWD: flatbed preferred.
towNotes: BATTERY IS IN FRUNK — many operators look at the rear engine and find no battery. Open the FRONT hood.
RWD: rear lift is incorrect — rear has engine, not drive axle for standard towing. Actually 911 is RWD — rear wheels drive. Lift from FRONT. Rear drive wheels roll.
AWD 4S/Turbo: flatbed preferred.
Low ground clearance — use flatbed with wheel grids, not hooks on body.

epb.override: Restore 12V from frunk battery. Hold EPB button.
steps: Open frunk (front hood). Connect jump pack to 12V frunk battery.

airSuspension.description: PASM optional. Sport suspension or air suspension.
towingNotes: Check ride height — some 911s are very low stock.
Jack Mode if air suspension equipped: hold height button 5-10 sec.

battery.location: FRUNK (front hood / front storage compartment) — NOT at the rear engine
battery.jumpTerminals: Front hood (frunk) battery terminals — red (+) / black (−)
battery.warnings: BATTERY IS IN THE FRUNK — DO NOT look for it at the rear engine bay.

knownIssues.title: Battery Is in the Frunk, NOT at the Rear Engine
knownIssues.detail: The Porsche 911 has a rear-mounted engine but the 12V battery is in the front trunk (frunk). Many operators open the rear engine lid looking for the battery and cannot find it. Open the FRONT hood to access the battery and jump terminals.

knownIssues.title: Very Low Ground Clearance
knownIssues.detail: Many 911 variants have very low ground clearance, especially with PASM sport suspension lowered. Use caution during flatbed approach angle. Lowered 911s may need blocks or minimal ramp angle.

vehicles.slot: Touchscreen on PCM — Service > Tow Mode. Or override slot near selector.
shift: PREFERRED: Use Porsche Communication Management (PCM) touchscreen — Menu > Service > Tow Mode. This enables Neutral and disables parking brake.
MANUAL OVERRIDE: locate slot near selector base. Insert key, press. Move to N.
Without power: frunk 12V terminal — connect jump pack, restore power, then use PCM.
neutral: Connect jump pack to frunk 12V terminals.
Restore power. Use PCM Tow Mode (Service menu).
NEVER touch HV battery — orange cables.
vehicles.notes: FLATBED ONLY. Tow Mode via PCM. 12V battery in frunk.
vehicles.warn: FLATBED ONLY. Never tow with any driven wheels on ground. 12V auxiliary only — never touch HV system.
vehicles.towMethod: FLATBED ONLY — electric drivetrain. Regenerative braking will damage motors if wheels roll while being towed.
towNotes: ELECTRIC VEHICLE — FLATBED ONLY. No exceptions.
PCM Tow Mode (Service menu) is the correct and safest Neutral method.
12V battery in frunk — NEVER touch orange HV cables/battery.
Very heavy vehicle — verify flatbed weight capacity.

epb.override: Tow Mode on PCM automatically releases EPB. Or restore 12V from frunk and use EPB button.
steps: Connect jump pack to frunk 12V terminals.
Activate PCM Tow Mode: Menu > Service > Tow Mode.
Tow Mode releases EPB and engages Neutral automatically.

airSuspension.description: Air suspension standard on Taycan. PCM Tow Mode also adjusts suspension.
towingNotes: Tow Mode normalizes suspension for loading.
If power not available, suspension may be in non-standard position — check clearance.

vehicles.steeringLock: Electronic steering lock — Tow Mode disengages it.

battery.location: FRUNK (front hood / front storage) — NOT under rear trunk floor
battery.warnings: FLATBED ONLY. 12V auxiliary ONLY — NEVER touch orange HV battery cables. Tow Mode via PCM is required.

knownIssues.title: Tow Mode via PCM Is the Only Correct Method
knownIssues.detail: The correct and safest way to put a Taycan in Neutral is via Tow Mode on the PCM touchscreen (Menu > Service > Tow Mode). This safely engages neutral AND releases the EPB. Do not rely solely on the column selector for neutral — the vehicle can re-engage drive without Tow Mode active.

knownIssues.title: 12V Battery in Frunk
knownIssues.detail: Like the 911, the Taycan has its 12V auxiliary battery in the front storage area (frunk). The rear trunk is for luggage. The battery and jump terminals are accessed by opening the front hood.

vehicles.slot: PDK: selector base override slot. Manual: no lock.
shift: PDK: find override slot at selector base. Insert key, press. Press brake. Move to N.
Manual: depress clutch, select N — no shift lock.
neutral: BATTERY IS IN THE FRONT TRUNK (frunk) — mid-engine vehicle, no conventional trunk.
Connect jump pack to frunk battery terminals.
Restore power. Shift normally or use override.
vehicles.notes: Mid-engine. Battery in frunk (front storage). RWD — lift from front.
vehicles.warn: Battery is in the FRUNK (front storage area). Very low ground clearance.
vehicles.towMethod: Lift from front (rear drive wheels roll) or flatbed. Flatbed preferred for low-clearance models.
towNotes: Battery in frunk — open front hood.
Very low clearance — use flatbed with care.

epb.override: Restore 12V from frunk battery. Hold EPB button.

vehicles.steeringLock: Electronic or key steering lock depending on year.

battery.location: FRUNK (front storage compartment) — mid-engine, battery is up front
battery.warnings: Battery in FRUNK. Very low ground clearance — use flatbed carefully.

knownIssues.title: Battery in Frunk, Not Under Rear Trunk
knownIssues.detail: Mid-engine layout means the rear has the engine, the front has the storage area (frunk) where the battery lives. The rear 'trunk' is actually the engine compartment. Do not confuse the two.
